text:
Found it! The token selection handler (lines 2159-2180) only handles `selectingFor === 'from'` or `'to'`, but when the user clicks "Add Token" in the batch swap, it sets `selectingFor` to `'from'` (line 1899). This means it's setting the `fromToken` instead of adding to `batchTokens`!

Let me fix this by adding a `'batch'` case to the token selection handler:
